name: Next Level Automotive - AL
reason: Owner-operated detailing shop — appointment-based, every missed call is a missed booking
emailSubject: Athens customers calling after hours — are you getting them?
emailBody:
Hey Dylan,

I came across Next Level Automotive and I know how it goes — when you're in the middle of a detail or coating job, the phone rings and nobody can pick up.

I built GrabCalls, an AI that answers your phone 24/7, books appointments, and answers questions about your services — so you never miss a customer while your hands are full.

Auto shops like yours are seeing 15-20% more bookings just from capturing the calls that used to go to voicemail.

Call (205) 605-9842 right now and hear the AI answer live — takes 30 seconds.

Eric Glover
Founder, GrabCalls
